name: screenpipe/screenpipe
description: 24/7 local screen + microphone recording with OCR, audio transcription, and semantic search. MCP server exposes 6 tools (search-content, export-video, list-meetings, activity-summary, search-elements, frame-context) so Claude can search everything you've seen, said, or heard. 100% local SQLite. MIT licensed, 18k+ stars.
